field_values.action_summary: The protagonist wakes up naked in a yellowish, mossy basin on Mars. He discovers that the low gravity makes even basic movements result in massive, uncontrolled leaps.
field_values.camera_intent: POV shots of the alien landscape; Wide shots showing scale of leaps; Close-ups of physical exertion and confusion
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: height and distance of jumps relative to terrain
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the protagonist's disorientation and the physical reality of Martian gravity through uncontrolled, massive leaps within a mossy basin.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (naked, physically fit)

## Required Environments
- arizona_quartz_vein_basin (yellowish moss, quartz outcroppings, incubator enclosure)

## Continuity Constraints
- Protagonist must remain naked throughout the scene.
- Jump height and distance must be consistent with low-gravity physics relative to rock scale.

## Beat List
- BT001: protagonist wakes up confused
- BT002: first attempt at movement results in massive leap
- BT003: physical shock and disorientation from gravity
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
